name: Stir-Fried Broccoli W/Orange Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all sauce ingredients in a small bowl and set aside.
2. Heat skillet over high heat. Add oil to the skillet, when smoking, add broccoli and stir fry for 1-1/2 minutes until cooked through. Push florets to sides of the pan, making well in center, put garlic, ginger, and scallion in center. Drizzle remaining oil over center, remove from heat, and stir to combine. Place back on heat and add orange juice mixture. Stir lightly to coat broccoli as sauce thickens slightly. Serve.
